emails.subject: RE: netco
emails.body: RE: netco I left you on Portland for now but obviously when we announce the strucutre it will change. Duran does know though. To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: Re: NETCO
emails.body: Re: NETCO One final new year's email: the netco startup plan for power is assuming 45-60 days to get a FERC license, 60-120 days to get transmission and pool agreements, etc so transaction volumes will be trivial for the first few months unless we look at some new approaches such as buying a small marketer. Presto, belden, sager, nicholai and I are meeting 9:30 wednesday to discuss. Hillis set up a room if you would like to attend. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: NETCO
emails.body: RE: NETCO No this is a serious problem FERC is just a month and probably will be expediated to less than that. I want all the transmission and pool agreements to start much earlier what is the problem with starting the negotiation now. We really cannot accept these timescales we have always assumed one month and all of this stuff is in place. I'll be on the phone call let me know times/numbers Tammie get Liz Sager to attend To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: RE: NETCO
emails.body: what level of detail? every person or just down to the team leader level? Chris Calger 503-464-3735
